heading: Procedure
body:
Start the Qlik Sense desktop application.

- Click Create a New App.

- Enter a name for the app and Create.  If created
  successfully, Open app.

- Click Add data from files and other sources.

- Select ODBC from the list of data sources.

- In the Create New Connection window, in the
  System DSN, select the DSN that you created earlier.

  Leave the Username and Password fields
  blank as the application uses the username and password specified
  in the DSN during the ODBC set up.

- Click Create.
